name: log_trade
description: Log a completed trade to the trading history. Use this after every trade (win or loss) to build data for pattern analysis. Required fields: symbol, direction, entry, exit, pnl_percent, result. Use list=true or stats=true to view data instead of logging.

symbol.description: Trading pair symbol in uppercase (e.g., BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT)

direction.description: Trade direction: LONG for buy, SHORT for sell

entry.description: Entry price as a decimal number (e.g., 78000.50)

exit.description: Exit price as a decimal number (e.g., 79500.00)

pnl_percent.description: Profit or loss as a percentage decimal (e.g., 1.92 for 1.92% profit, -2.5 for 2.5% loss)

result.description: Trade outcome: WIN for profit, LOSS for loss

leverage.description: Leverage multiplier as an integer (e.g., 5, 10, 20; omit if not used)

reason.description: Trading rationale or setup description (e.g., RSI oversold + support bounce)

indicators.description: JSON string with technical indicator values at entry time (e.g., '{"rsi": 28, "macd": "bullish_cross"}')

market_context.description: JSON string with market conditions at entry (e.g., '{"btc_trend": "up", "dxy": 104.5, "day": "tuesday"}')

list.description: Set to true to list recent trades instead of logging (use with last parameter)

last.description: Number of recent trades to list (use only when list=true)

stats.description: Set to true to show trading statistics instead of logging

name: analyze
description: Analyze logged trades to discover patterns in wins and losses. Use this to identify which directions, days, or conditions have higher win rates. Returns insights with win rates and suggested rules. Run generate_rules after this to create actionable rules.

symbol.description: Filter analysis to a specific trading pair (e.g., BTCUSDT)

direction.description: Filter analysis to a specific trade direction

min_trades.description: Minimum number of trades required in a category for it to be included in analysis (default: 3)

name: generate_rules
description: Generate actionable trading rules from analyzed trade patterns. Use this after analyze to create rules based on statistically significant patterns. Rules are stored internally and used by update_memory. Output includes PREFER and AVOID rules with win rate evidence.

name: update_memory
description: Append learned trading rules to a MEMORY.md file. Use this to persist rules generated by generate_rules. The rules section is appended to the existing file content. Use dry_run=true to preview the rules section before writing.

memory_path.description: File path to the MEMORY.md file (e.g., /path/to/agent/MEMORY.md)

dry_run.description: If true, output the rules section without modifying the file
